verification.difficulty_notes: Grammar: N4 ている with の nominalizer (7/10). Vocabulary: 立つ, 男 (5/10). Length: Medium (5/10). Cultural: Universal (2/10). Overall: N4 level
verification.overall_notes: Contains N4+ ている form. Not suitable for N5

verification.target_vocab_notes: 万 (まん) appears in compound 万年筆 (fountain pen)
verification.kana_notes: Perfect match between kana and Japanese sentence
verification.grammar_notes: Contains ている form (持っています - have/possess) which is N4+ continuous aspect. While common for possession, it's technically N4+
verification.difficulty_notes: Grammar: N4 ている for possession (6/10). Vocabulary: 万年筆 compound (5/10). Length: Short (3/10). Cultural: Universal (2/10). Overall: N4 level
verification.overall_notes: Contains N4+ ている form. Target vocab appears in compound only

verification.target_vocab_notes: 万 (まん) appears in compound 万年筆 (fountain pen)
verification.kana_notes: Perfect match between kana and Japanese sentence
verification.grammar_notes: Uses N5 grammar: い-adjective (新しい), を particle, ta-form (買った), んだ explanatory ending
verification.difficulty_notes: Grammar: Past tense with んだ (4/10). Vocabulary: 新しい, 買う (4/10). Length: Short (3/10). Cultural: Universal (2/10). Overall: Low-mid N5
verification.overall_notes: Good N5 example. Target vocab in compound but clearly present

verification.target_vocab_notes: 万 (まん) appears in compound 万年筆 (fountain pen)
verification.kana_notes: Perfect match between kana and Japanese sentence
verification.grammar_notes: Contains ている form contracted as てる (持ってる - have) which is N4+ continuous aspect
verification.difficulty_notes: Grammar: N4 ている contracted with って topic marker (6/10). Vocabulary: Casual contracted forms (5/10). Length: Short (3/10). Cultural: Universal (2/10). Overall: N4 level
verification.overall_notes: Contains N4+ contracted ている form. Not suitable for N5

verification.target_vocab_notes: 映画 (えいが) appears as the destination with に particle
verification.kana_notes: Perfect match between kana and Japanese sentence
verification.grammar_notes: Uses N5 grammar: の (possessive), 夜 (night), に particle (destination), negative question (行かない？)
verification.difficulty_notes: Grammar: Negative invitation question (5/10). Vocabulary: 明日, 夜, 行く (5/10). Length: Medium (4/10). Cultural: Universal (2/10). Overall: Mid N5
verification.overall_notes: Good N5 example showing negative question form for invitation
